015 */
016package org.consensusj.bitcoinj.signing;
017
018import org.bitcoinj.base.Coin;
019import org.bitcoinj.base.Sha256Hash;
020import org.bitcoinj.core.TransactionOutPoint;
021import org.bitcoinj.script.Script;
022
023import java.util.Objects;
024
025/**
026 *  UTXO info for transaction signing. Immutable and all fields non-nullable.
027 *  <p>Non-segwit can be signed without amount, but we're focusing on modern Bitcoin, so
028 *  we're going to simplify things by making {@link Utxo.Signable} mandatory in many methods.
029 */
030public interface Utxo {
031    Sha256Hash txId();
032    int index();
033
034    static Basic of(Sha256Hash txId, int index) {
035        return new Basic(txId, index);
036    }
037
038    static Signable of(Sha256Hash txId, int index, Coin amount) {
039        return new Signable(txId, index, amount);
040    }
041
042    static Complete of(Sha256Hash txId, int index, Coin amount, Script scriptPubKey) {
043        return new Complete(txId, index, amount, scriptPubKey);
044    }
045
046    static Utxo of(TransactionOutPoint outPoint) {
047        if (outPoint.getConnectedOutput() == null || outPoint.getConnectedOutput().getValue() == null) {
048            throw new IllegalArgumentException("outpoint is not complete enough: no value ");
049        }
050        if (outPoint.getConnectedOutput().getScriptPubKey() == null) {
051            return new Signable(outPoint.hash(), (int) outPoint.index(), outPoint.getConnectedOutput().getValue());
052        } else {
053            return new Signable(outPoint.hash(), (int) outPoint.index(), outPoint.getConnectedOutput().getValue());
054        }
055    }
056
057    /**
058     * Bare minimum UTXO info: txId and index (aka TransactionOutPoint)
059     */
060    class Basic implements Utxo {
061        private final Sha256Hash txId;
062        private final int index;
063
064        public Basic(Sha256Hash txId, int index) {
065            this.txId = Objects.requireNonNull(txId);
066            this.index = index;
067        }
068
069        @Override
070        public Sha256Hash txId() {
071            return txId;
072        }
073
074        @Override
075        public int index() {
076            return index;
077        }
078
079        Signable addAmount(Coin amount) {
080            return Utxo.of(txId, index, amount);
081        }
082    }
083
084    /**
085     * UTXO with "amount" which is necessary for signing a segwit transaction.
086     */
087    class Signable implements Utxo {
088        private final Sha256Hash txId;
089        private final int index;
090        private final Coin amount;
091
092        public Signable(Sha256Hash txId, int index, Coin amount) {
093            this.txId = Objects.requireNonNull(txId);
094            this.index = index;
095            this.amount = Objects.requireNonNull(amount);
096        }
097
098        @Override
099        public Sha256Hash txId() {
100            return txId;
101        }
102
103        @Override
104        public int index() {
105            return index;
106        }
107
108        public Coin amount() {
109            return amount;
110        }
111    }
112
113    /**
114     * UTXO with {@code amount} and {@code scriptPubKey}. Everything needed to build a transaction input with
115     * {@code scriptSig} to spend this output.
116     */
117    class Complete implements Utxo {
118        private final Sha256Hash txId;
119        private final int index;
120        private final Coin amount;
121        private final Script scriptPubKey;
122
123        public Complete(Sha256Hash txId, int index, Coin amount, Script scriptPubKey) {
124            this.txId = Objects.requireNonNull(txId);
125            this.index = index;
126            this.amount = Objects.requireNonNull(amount);
127            this.scriptPubKey = Objects.requireNonNull(scriptPubKey);
128        }
129
130        @Override
131        public Sha256Hash txId() {
132            return txId;
133        }
134
135        @Override
136        public int index() {
137            return index;
138        }
139
140        public Coin amount() {
141            return amount;
142        }
143
144        public Script scriptPubKey() {
145            return scriptPubKey;
146        }
147    }
148}
